title: Hell Hath No Fury halves opponent primary remaining HP after Lightning

card.rawText: Play this card from your hand when your opponent plays a Lightning card. Take away 1/2 of the remaining HP of their primary creature. This card cannot be negated.

plan.title: Hell Hath No Fury halves opponent primary remaining HP after Lightning
plan.summary: Respond to an opponent Lightning card and verify Hell Hath No Fury removes half of the opponent primary creature remaining HP, rounded up.

notes: Player_1 responds from hand with Hell Hath No Fury.
Opponent primary creature starts at 50 HP; taking away half leaves 25 HP.

steps: Player_1 responds with Hell Hath No Fury.
Resolve the half-remaining-HP damage against player_2 primary creature.

expectedAssertions.label: Opponent primary is reduced to half remaining HP
Hell Hath No Fury leaves hand after resolving

manualVerification: Half values round up per global rules.
riskNotes: This fixture depends on opponent-Lightning response routing for a Lightning-vs-Lightning response.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run gen2_054_hell_hath_no_fury-054-e02 through headless Gen 2 effect QA.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and card rules text remain source of truth.
